title: ANZSRC 2020 FoR Division 52 Psychology groups
authority: Australian Bureau of Statistics, Stats NZ, Australian Research Council, and New Zealand Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment
scope: The six group-level categories directly under ANZSRC 2020 Fields of Research Division 52 Psychology. This classifies R&D activity in Australia and New Zealand; it is neither a taxonomy of every psychological concept nor a global psychology universe. Division 52 explicitly excludes Indigenous psychology to Division 45 Indigenous studies.
notes: Group-level slice only. Field-level 520101-529999 terms remain a later P1 expansion and must not be implied by this coverage result.
